postToolUse.bash: printf '%s\n' '{"additionalContext":"File changes were made. Before claiming completion, summarize changed files, run the most relevant tests or explain why tests were not run, and call out assumptions."}'

postToolUseFailure.bash: printf '%s\n' '{"additionalContext":"A tool failed. Do not retry blindly. Explain the failure, reduce scope, and propose the next safe command or edit."}'
